arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Borussia Dortmund-Barcelona: Robert Lewandowski doubt and Alejandro Balde out
arts.sum: Barcelona will be sending a weaker team to Germany to face Borussia Dortmund at 21:00 CEST at the Signal Iduna Park, after losing starting left-back Alejandro Balde over the weekend. There are also doubts up fron for Hansi Flick’s side. arts.ttl: Newcastle beat Barcelona and Real Madrid to teenage prospect
arts.sum: Newcastle United have reportedly beaten Barcelona and Real Madrid to signing of Antonio Cordero from Malaga. The 18-year-old winger is one of the most highly-rated prospects in Spanish football following an impressive debut campaign in the Segunda División. So far this season Cordero has started 18 matches and come off the bench another 13 times […] The post Newcastle beat Barcelona and Real Madrid to teenage prospect first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: FC Barcelona to Wear White Shorts vs Borussia Dortmund in Champions League
arts.sum: FC Barcelona will sport an altered kit combination for their crucial Champions League match against Borussia Dortmund tonight.

Ahead of the trip to Germany, coach Hansi Flick has named the travelling squad for this Borussia Dortmund v FC Barcelona match. The FC Barcelona goalkeeper intent on avoiding complacency in his pre-game press appearance ahead of the Champions League second leg against Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid and Barcelona lose out on 18-year-old Spanish talent as contract is agreed
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Barcelona are generally competing for the very best talents in Spanish football, and few escape their grasps. That is the case for 18-year-old winger Antonio Cordero though, who is headed for the Premier League. arts.ttl: Newcastle transfer news: Magpies 'complete deal' to sign Spanish winger who snubs Real Madrid, Barcelona
arts.sum: Newcastle United reportedly beat Barcelona and Real Madrid in the race to sign Malaga's teenage winger Antonio Cordero this summer.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund predicted XI vs Barcelona
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will be without Nico Schlotterbeck, Emre Can and Marcel Sabitzer for their UEFA Champions League game against Barcelona on Tuesday night as they look to overturn a four-goal…

arts.ttl: Iñigo Martínez gives new meaning to 'remontada' for Barcelona
arts.sum: It once looked like the ship to Barcelona had sailed for Iñigo Martínez. Now he's Barça's defensive leader, vital to their hopes of winning the treble.
